g.text: PC=1 OP_REWIND — cursor at first row
OP_LE reads r1 and r2 — no register written
SKIP — age <= 18 — row excluded by WHERE
MATCH — age > 18 — row passes WHERE filter
r1 | VAL_INTEGER | 25 WRITTEN — age from leaf cell
cmp > 0 — NOT LE — fall-through to PC=5
Jump to PC=7 (OP_NEXT). r3 stays NULL. Row not emitted.
Fall-through to PC=5. r1 and r2 still hold their values.
r3 | VAL_TEXT | Alice WRITTEN — name from leaf cell
Orange — conditional branch opcode (OP_LE, OP_GT, OP_EQ)
Red — row excluded (predicate FALSE or NULL)
Dashed arrow — back-edge (loop) or skip jump
